title: sedum lineare
intro: Sedum lineare, also known as dragon's blood sedum or narrow-leaved stonecrop, is a species of flowering plant in the family Crassulaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Sedum lineare can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other ailments.
